# QUEBEC.AI Public Record

This page is the public authority index for QUEBEC.AI doctrine, proof, governance, technical references, LinkedIn articles, build repositories, and 2017 Multi-Agent AI DAO prior art.

Primary public path: https://QuebecAI.github.io/public-record/

Key concepts: Sovereign Manifesto, Proof Room, Security & Governance, Sovereign AI, AGI ALPHA, AI Debate, Strategic Reference Library, Public Build Surface, Multi-Agent AI DAO Prior Art.
